reason: The image depicts a scene that aims to represent the discovery of the Lava Treasure in Corsica around 1985. However, several elements are anachronistic. The clothing (sportswear jackets with visible zippers and modern design), the plastic crates used to contain the recovered artifacts, and the overall clarity and resolution of the photography strongly suggest a modern setting. The modern jackets and plastic containers are not consistent with the technology of the time. While the coastline and the sea spray elements are accurate, the presence of modern materials and clothing disqualifies the image as a faithful representation of the event in 1985.
